training_status: locked in with diet, training, and hormones

benefits.description: Extremely noticeable visceral fat loss at 2 IU HGH dose
Noticeable skin quality improvement; face leaned out and lost approximately 10 years in appearance after induction water came off

side_effects.description: Induction water retention in subcutaneous areas, particularly in chin; makes appearance sloppy. Water retention from dose increases is temporary but variable
Retatrutide caused no water retention anywhere; resulted in no pump and flat muscles

protocol_notes: User emphasizes that results depend on locked-in diet, training, and hormone protocols. 2 IU HGH showed faster visceral fat loss than commonly recommended 4-6 IU range for this user. Attributes ability to track variables to optimized baseline protocols. Notes 1 mg retatrutide eliminated water retention that HGH caused.
